chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4277 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No. 17599/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 3 3. For order on Misc. No. 17600/2025 (Exemption/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.08.2025 M/s. Muhammad Imran Kalmati and Aqib Khan Shar Advocates for the Petitioner.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner after arguing at some length submits that he does not wish to press this petition and that in the first instance he would approach the concerned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace with his grievance that the police is not registering his FIR. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
